descriptionTemplate:
At the start of the battle, place 1 {Obsession} into hand.
Miryam's "Basic Strike" enjoys 50% {Tentacle DMG} bonus.
For every 1% Crit. DMG provided by Miryam and her equipped Wheel of Destiny & Covenant, enhance her Exalt's {STR} Generation, {Tentacle DMG}, Aliemus, and {Poison} Application/Trigger effects by 0.2%.
